name: qwen3-tts-webui
description: Qwen3-TTS Web UI — frontend hosted on Cloudflare Pages, GPU backend on Modal

scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=qwen3-tts-webui
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=qwen3-tts-webui --branch=preview
